div.p: Manages all topic subscriptions with mutex-protected maps. Supports both fan-out and consumer-group delivery modes.
Broadcasts each message to ALL subscribers of a topic. Per-subscriber goroutines prevent head-of-line blocking.

g.text: • Goroutine per connection: cheap (~2KB stack), scales to 100K+
• RWMutex: allows concurrent reads, serializes writes
• Per-subscriber channels: slow client A doesn't block client B
• Copy-on-read for subscriber lists: safe iteration without lock
• Atomic msgID counter: no lock needed for ID generation
